name: Extreme OBI @ 50-tick horizon
hypothesis: Pushing the OBI threshold to an extreme level (0.98) will isolate a near-perfectly predictive subset of events, further increasing the high win rate observed in the parent spec, albeit with fewer trading opportunities.
mutation_note: Tightened threshold from 0.95 to 0.98 based on feedback 'tighten_threshold' and the improvement proposal. This tests the signal at its practical limit.
